Type scale
TYPOGRAPHY
Type scale
Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for all numbers, masks, and codes. Mono numbers are tabular for column alignment.

Spacing · radius · elevation
SPACING · RADIUS · ELEVATION
Layout primitives
4px spacing base. Radius 6px default — subtle, not pillowy. Soft warm-tinted shadows.

Locale · INR · DD/MM/YYYY
LOCALE · INR · DATES
Number & date formatting
Indian numbering system (12,34,567), DD/MM/YYYY dates, lakh / crore for compact display, sign-prefixed deltas.
Standard
₹12,34,567
With paise
₹84,200.50
Compact · L
₹12.35 L
Compact · Cr
₹2.45 Cr
Negative
-₹12,500
Zero
₹0
Dates
Long
16/04/2026
Short
16 Apr 26
Maturity
12/08/2042
Deltas
Gain
+12.4%
Loss

Flat

Buttons, inputs, badges, KPIs, savings cards, table, charts, documents.

Charts
CHARTS
Cashflow & projection
Pure SVG, theme-aware. Cashflow uses paired bars; projection uses an area + maturity marker.
12-month cashflow
Income Outflow
Projection · Parag Parikh Flexi Cap
maturity 2046 · ₹62.4L expected
Documents · upload + parse
DOCUMENTS
Upload & parse status
Drag-drop zone · per-document tile with parser id + parse status. Failed parses surface a re-run action; locked docs prompt for password.
Drop bank or insurance statements
PDF or XLSX. Files are uploaded straight to your Google Drive — never to this app's servers.

Patterns · empty / password / toast
PATTERNS
Empty states · password prompt · toast
Recurring composites used across the app. Each is a small, themed Card with a clear primary action.
Empty states
No transactions for April yet
Drop in this month's bank or credit-card statements and we'll parse them in your browser.
No savings instruments
Add a mutual fund, LIC policy, RD or FD manually — or import a Groww holdings export.
PDF password prompt
Password required
hdfc-bank-××34.pdf is encrypted. Enter the password to unlock and parse it locally.
Password
••••••••
Toast
Parsed 47 transactions · HDFC Regalia Gold
sum-of-debits matches statement summary
!
HDFC Life parser failed · unrecognised layout
Open the doc to add a new regex match.
